_doc: Config for scripts/audit/check-ui-standards.js. `enforced` lists zero-tolerance category letters (A-E) that currently block the commit — add a letter once its violation count reaches 0. `ratchetBaselines` records the current count for each count-ratchet category (F-H); the check fails if a count rises above its baseline. Lower a baseline by hand after a sweep reduces the real count — never raise one without review.

notes.B: Raw .toLocaleDateString() calls — Phase 4 Sweep A was a targeted sweep (Appendix A file list), not exhaustive. ~38 production call sites remain outside that scope. Add 'B' to enforced once a follow-up sweep brings this to 0.
notes.F: Raw <TablePagination> usage — locked decision (2026-07-03): adopt DataTable for new pages + 3 pilots only, not a full migration. This is a large legitimate backlog, not a bug.
notes.G: Raw <CircularProgress> usage — includes many legitimate small-scope uses (inline button/submit spinners), not just full-page loading anti-patterns. Coarse ratchet: prevents unbounded growth, not a per-instance correctness signal.
notes.H: page.tsx without PageHeader — large pre-existing backlog; targeted sweeps only per the locked decision, not a full migration.
